notes.note: Greeting in the augural register: 'colleague' refers to the augural college, into which Cicero had been co-opted in 53 BC after Crassus's death, and to which the Marcelli of this generation belonged.

notes.anchor: your Marcellus has been made consul
notes.note: A familiar third-person address: the addressee himself was returned consul for 50 BC at the elections of summer 51 BC. Cicero, on his way out to Cilicia, sends his congratulations the moment news catches him.
